name: data-postgres
description: PostgreSQL persistence is provided by the base app's SQLDatabase("app") (apps/api/db, spec 001): Encore owns connection pooling, health, and migration application. The Express pg.Pool config, db-retry, and db-metrics middleware have no Encore analog and are retired. This module is a declarative marker that persistence is built into the base; it ships no apps/api/src/** payload and no separate pg dependency. New tables are added as migrations under a feature module's db/ (see user-management).
